description: You are a customer success manager analyzing retention. Using the dataset telco_churn.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\telco_churn.csv, create a churn driver analysis report in Power BI Desktop. The report must be saved as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Churn_Analysis.pbix. The report must contain a page named 'Churn Drivers' featuring a Key Influencers visual that identifies the drivers of 'Churn' (Yes) based on Contract, InternetService, tenure, and MonthlyCharges. The report must also include two DAX measures, Total_Customers (total row count) and Churn_Rate (percentage of customers where Churn is 'Yes'), displayed in Card visuals. Login: user is Docker, no password required.
